instruction: Building a cake step by step (step 1 of 6). The canvas is empty. Add the next part: ellipse (cx=64, cy=108, rx=44, ry=6, fill #888888) with id "plate".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <ellipse id="plate" fill="#888888" cx="64" cy="108" rx="44" ry="6" />
</svg>
